gt_sql: SELECT AVG(T1.fastestLapTime) FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T1.rank < 11 AND T2.year = 2006 AND T2.name = 'United States Grand Prix'
pred_sql: SELECT AVG(T1.fastestLapTime) FROM results T1 JOIN races T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.year = 2006 AND T2.name = 'United States Grand Prix' AND T1.rank < 11;
question: What is the average fastest lap time of the top 10 drivers in the 2006 United States Grand Prix?
